summary: Full codebase bug hunt session. Dispatched 6 cartographers across all packages + 14 secretary fix lanes (later trimmed to 3 after verifying 11 bugs were already fixed by prior sessions). Discovered that session_suggest shows stale data — 4 of 6 "unfixed bugs" were already fixed by AH-001/AH-003/AH-005/AH-006. Recorded 8 new findings including noUncheckedIndexedAccess gap, @pierre/diffs supply chain risk, @opencode-ai/script duplicate dep, missing native/ directory, and 109 `any` types. Confirmed 10 still-open issues. 3 fix lanes remain active: electronWindows rename, Electron error handler, fixture db SQLite cleanup. Journalist dispatched to consolidate. Session ending with structured artifact produced.
